# Our Shipping

Standard shipping takes 5–7 business days within the contiguous United States.
Express shipping is available at checkout (2 business days). International
shipping takes 10–14 business days depending on destination.

Domestic orders are fulfilled by UPS, FedEx, or USPS. International orders
ship via DHL Express or FedEx International. A tracking number is emailed
automatically once your order ships. Check status via [[order-tracking]].

[Source: shipping_info.md#delivery-timelines]
